name: Scheme Order Attributes
description: Transaction metadata for confirmed scheme application orders: government reference IDs, disbursement records, and application outcome.
privacy_notes: sor:governmentApplicationId is a sensitive government reference — do not expose in public indices.
sor:governmentTransactionReference is a financial transaction ID — treat as PII.
sor:applicantConsentGiven and sor:consentTimestamp are consent records — retain per applicable data retention law.
Core Order billing fields (name, address, phone) are PII — handle per local data protection regulation.
